response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise and has only basic German language skills, which are mandatory for client collaboration in the insurance sector; their career trajectory shows senior-level roles far beyond an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit and motivation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and TDD practices
concerns: Minimal Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, not sufficient for client-facing consulting
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, mismatched for entry-level role
